title: boechera perennans
intro: Boechera perennans, also known as the perennial rock cress, is a type of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that is native to the western United States. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which have been shown to help treat wounds, reduce swelling, and fight off infections. The health benefits of Boechera perennans include its ability to support immune function, reduce pain and inflammation, and promote wound healing. Boechera perennans can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
